name: 🌸 QUEEN-MISHU-MD 🌸
description: 🌸 WhatsApp bot made by ArslanMD Official | Power Mode Enabled 💖

SESSION_ID.description: 🌸 Put your session-id here. Get it from Pairing Code.

PREFIX.description: 🌸 Paste your bot prefix. Don't apply null prefix.

MODE.description: 🌸 Select your bot work type: public-private-inbox-group

ANTI_DELETE.description: 🌸 Set true to show deleted messages.

ALWAYS_ONLINE.description: 🌸 Make it true if you want bot always online.

AUTO_REPLY.description: 🌸 Make it true if you want automatic reply.

AUTO_STICKER.description: 🌸 Make it true if you want automatic sticker.

AUTO_STATUS_SEEN.description: 🌸 Make it true for automatic status seen.

AUTO_STATUS_REACT.description: 🌸 Make it true for automatic status reaction or like.

AUTO_STATUS_REPLY.description: 🌸 Make it true for auto reply message on status seen.

AUTO_STATUS_MSG.description: 🌸 Type custom message on status reply
AUTO_STATUS_MSG.value:
🌸 Just saw your status! You're looking beautiful today! 💖
✨ Keep shining like a star! 👸
🎀 With love, MISHU QUEEN 💕

OWNER_NUMBER.description: 🌸 Put the owner number for bot.

ANTI_LINK.description: 🌸 Make it true if you want bot auto remove group link.

ANTI_LINK_KICK.description: 🌸 Make it true if you want bot auto kick for group link.

ANTI_BAD.description: 🌸 Make it true if you want bot auto delete bad words.

MENTION_REPLY.description: 🌸 Make it true if want mention reply when someone mentions you.

MENU_IMAGE_URL.description: 🌸 Add URL for menu and mention reply image.

DESCRIPTION.description: 🌸 Add caption for menu and other.

DELETE_LINKS.description: 🌸 Remove links from group automatically without removing member.

AUTO_RECORDING.description: 🌸 Make it true if you want auto recording.

AUTO_TYPING.description: 🌸 Make it true if you want auto typing.

AUTO_REACT.description: 🌸 Make it true if you want react on every message.

CUSTOM_REACT.description: 🌸 Make it true if you want custom reactions.

ANTI_DEL_PATH.description: 🌸 Change to 'same' to resend deleted message in same chat otherwise 'inbox'.

ADMIN_EVENTS.description: 🌸 Make it true if you want to know who promote or demote a member.

WELCOME.description: 🌸 Make it true if you want goodbye and welcome message in groups.

READ_MESSAGE.description: 🌸 Make it true if you want bot to read all messages.

GIRL_MODE.description: 🌸 Enable Girl Power Mode for feminine vibes.

PRINCESS_MODE.description: 🌸 Enable Princess Mode for royal treatment.

QUEEN_MODE.description: 🌸 Enable Queen Mode for boss lady vibes.

PINK_THEME.description: 🌸 Enable Pink Theme for girly aesthetics.

WELCOME_MSG.description: 🌸 Custom welcome message for new members.
WELCOME_MSG.value:
🌸 Welcome to the group dear! 💖
✨ You're now part of Mishu Queen's family! 👸
🎀 Enjoy your stay! 💕

GOODBYE_MSG.description: 🌸 Custom goodbye message for leaving members.
GOODBYE_MSG.value:
🌸 Goodbye dear! 💖
✨ You'll be missed in Mishu Queen's family! 👸
🎀 Come back soon! 💕
